title: DRW MD-DRW-529: Payload Rail System
text:
Drawing MD-DRW-529 Rev D — Payload Rail System

## Notes

1. All dimensions in millimetres unless stated.
2. Surface finish: Ra 3.2 unless noted.
3. Parts referenced: P-1024, P-1025, P-1159, P-1160.
4. Drawn by Tobias Wren, checked by Cass Doyle, approved by Felix Herrera.
